deprecationInfo.message: The comment editor now uses the generic %cancelButton_tooltip% key.
We made the internet settings its own page so the localized string needs to indicate that. The new localized string key is %data_loading_error_internetAccess_disabled%.
Prefer the generic %cancelButton_tooltip% key for new code.

The meaning of platform.isEditable was clarified to refer specifically to a project's primary content (e.g. Scripture text). Use %project_settings_platform_isEditable_description_2% for the new wording; the new project setting %project_settings_platform_isPublished_description% captures the 'is this a published reference / resource' distinction.

%redoButton_tooltip%.notes: The tooltip text for the redo button in the common undo/redo control used in various editors.

deprecationInfo.message: Removed the `Use` button entirely and made the selector the entire row.
The platform.selectBooks dialog is no longer used by Platform.Bible. This string remains for backward compatibility with extensions that may still invoke the dialog.
This was a test string with an outdated key format. Use %general_button_submit%
This exists to test deprecating localized strings. Do not remove or use.
The toolbar's standalone theme toggle button was replaced by the appearance toggle in the User Profile popover. Use %userProfile_appearance_dark%.
The toolbar's standalone theme toggle button was replaced by the appearance toggle in the User Profile popover. Use %userProfile_appearance_light%.
The toolbar's standalone theme toggle button was replaced by the appearance toggle in the User Profile popover, which does not surface a separate theme-loading error tooltip.

%undoButton_tooltip%.notes: The tooltip text for the undo button in the common undo/redo control used in various editors.

%yes%.notes: A confirmation word used in many places. For example, this may be used as the label on a button on a dialog.
